title: Ferrora
description: Ferrora is a community-driven server pack built for catching, battling, and building in Minecraft. Featuring Cobblemon, player-run gyms, towns, breeding, and classic mechanics like Mega Evolution and Dynamax.
body:
🌟 Welcome to Ferrora 🌟
Ferrora is a community-focused Cobblemon experience where players help shape the server through towns, gyms, and organizations.

This pack includes Cobblemon, letting you catch, train, and battle Pokémon in Minecraft. You’ll be able to take on player-run gyms and the Elite 4, where real trainers set the challenge. Build your own community with towns and organizations, trade with others, and create your own stories. Classic mechanics like Mega Evolutions and Dynamax are here too, along with a breeding system so you can hunt shinies or craft your dream team. To keep everything smooth and fair, we’ve added a handful of quality-of-life mods that support the community.
